title: FlowiseAI Flowise Airtable_Agent Code Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Flowise. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the run method of the Airtable_Agents class. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of a user-supplied string before using it to execute Python code. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the service account.
addtionnal_details: Flowise has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/commit/cf36fb71fbd33437166f8a94de8534a4d9b6180c
timeline:
2026-02-26 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-05-01 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-05-01 - Advisory Updated
credit: Dre Cura (@dre_cura) and Nicholas Zubrisky (@NZubrisky) of TrendAI Research
